title: Marqeta Announces Appointment of Mike Milotich as Permanent CEO
text: Marqeta Leadership Transition: Mike Milotich as Permanent CEO. Timeline: Mike Milotich succeeded Simon Khalaf, who stepped down as Chief Executive Officer in February 2025. Milotich served as Interim CEO since February 2025, in addition to his role of Chief Financial Officer. On September 8, 2025, Marqeta appointed Mike Milotich as chief executive officer and a director, effective immediately, after a seven-month search. The Board determined that Mike is the right CEO for Marqeta, and he has proven to be a talented team builder and thoughtful and steady hand while serving as Interim CEO. Mike Milotich's Background: Milotich has served as Marqeta's Interim Chief Executive Officer since February 2025 and Chief Financial Officer since February 2022. Prior to joining Marqeta, Milotich was the Senior Vice President of Corporate Finance and Investor Relations at Visa, responsible for understanding Visa's business and financial performance, managing the corporate outlook, evaluating M&A opportunities and communicating with the global investor community. Prior to Visa, he worked at PayPal and American Express in various business analysis roles, and he holds a bachelor's degree from the University of California, Santa Barbara and an MBA from New York University. The Board commenced a search for Marqeta's next Chief Financial Officer, and Milotich will continue to serve as CFO until a successor has been identified.
